members.title: Members
members.description: People on your team and what each of them can do.
members.adminNotice: Only the owner can add or remove people.

roleHelp.admin: Can create agents and manage the ones they run.
roleHelp.user: Can only use the agents shared with them.

roster.empty: No one else is on your team yet.

removeConfirm.title: Remove this person?
removeConfirm.description: They lose access to every agent right away. You can add them back later.

assignments.title: Who can use this agent
assignments.description: Pick the people who can chat with this agent. Turn everyone off to share it with the whole team.
assignments.empty: No one else to add yet.
